ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Apollo Pipes Limited's Board has approved a two-step amalgamation scheme to absorb KML Tradelinks Private Limited and Kisan Mouldings Limited, effective April 1, 2026. This strategic move aims to achieve significant operational and financial synergies by consolidating their similar businesses in the plastics and pipes sector, enhancing efficiency and market presence. A material impact and key takeaway is the post-amalgamation shift in Apollo Pipes' shareholding, where the promoter stake will dilute from 51.72% to 49.20%, resulting in the public holding a majority 50.52% stake in the combined entity.
